title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 ( AM ) ( FULL JACKET METAL )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 (
overview: Our Full Jacket 0.5mm mechanical pencil is a luxurious writing tool that boasts a full metal structure, ensuring long-lasting use. With its precision lead advancement mechanism and comfortable grip, this mechanical pencil offers a superior writing experience. Uses 0.5mm strong HB pencil leads.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.9 ( HB ) ( QUICK START )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.9 (
overview: Our M&G Quick Start mechanical pencil features a trigonal barrel design that ensures a comfortable grip and prevents slipping during use. The non-slip surface of the barrel provides excellent traction and control, allowing for precise and accurate writing. With 0.9mm HB leads, it is perfect for both writing and drawing, and the leads are easy to replace when needed.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 ( CLASSIC )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 (
overview: Improve your office character with our M&G Classic 0.5mm automatic mechanical pencil featuring an ergonomic and comfortable grip. This sleek and stylish mechanical pencil allows for precision writing and drawing, while the soft grip ensures a comfortable and fatigue-free writing experience, even during long periods of use. With its automatic lead advancement mechanism, you can focus on your work without interruption, making this mechanical pencil a must-have for any professional setting.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 ( M-GRIP )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 (
overview: Our M&G M-Grip is a 0.5mm fully automatic mechanical pencil that features a self-advancing mechanism that automatically dispenses lead as you write. The pencil is designed with an ergonomic grip that is comfortable to hold, and it can be adjusted to fit your preferred grasp position. With this pencil, you can enjoy a smooth and effortless writing experience without the need to manually advance the lead.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 ( SAPHIR )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 (
overview: Our M&G Saphir is an ergonomic mechanical pencil that features a dual injection grip that ensures maximum comfort and ease of use. Its retractable design prevents lead breakage and leakage, making it durable and long-lasting. Refilling the pencil is a breeze thanks to its easy-to-use mechanism, and the durable rubber construction ensures a secure grip. With a 0.5mm lead size and a variety of barrel colours to choose from, this pencil is the perfect writing tool for any task.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.7 ( 2004 ZENIS-OFFICE LINE )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.7 (
overview: Our M&G 2004 Zenis-Office Line mechanical pencil is a fine writing mechanical pencil that features a 0.7mm lead for precise lines and detailed writing. Its comfortable textured rubber grip provides a comfortable and secure hold, while its sturdy metal tip prevents lead leakage. The pencil is also available in assorted barrel colours, making it a stylish and functional choice for anyone in need of a reliable writing tool. Overall, it is a great option for those who value precision, comfort, and style in their writing instruments.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 2.0 ( 2B ) ( SAVE THE TREE )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 2.0 (
overview: Our Save The Tree mechanical pencil is a 2.0mm sharpener-free writing tool that comes equipped with a convenient sharpener in the push button. It is also eco-friendly, featuring wooden pencil lead in a plastic body. The leads used in this mechanical pencil offer a perfect balance of dark, strong lines and smooth writing, making it a great choice for those who value precision and quality in their writing tools. Overall, this mechanical pencil is a convenient and eco-friendly option for those seeking a reliable writing instrument.

title: M&G MULTI-USE M/PENCIL 1.8 ( 2B ) ( SKETCH/EXAM )
subtitle: M&G MULTI-USE M/PENCIL 1.8
overview: Our M&G Multi-Use mechanical pencil Sketch/Exam features a 0.9*1.8mm chisel 2B pencil lead, making it an ideal tool for calligraphy, exam sheets, and drawing. Its comfortable textured rubber grip provides a secure hold, ensuring a comfortable writing experience. Additionally, the pencil is equipped with a convenient eraser located in the cap, allowing for quick and easy corrections. Overall, it is a great choice for those seeking a precise and comfortable writing tool that can handle a variety of tasks.

title: M&G MULTI-USE M/PENCIL 1.8 ( 2B ) ( MOTTO )
subtitle: M&G MULTI-USE M/PENCIL 1.8
overview: Our M&G Multi-use mechanical pencil Motto is designed for convenient use, with a side advance mechanism that allows for easy lead advancement without interrupting the writing flow. It uses strong 0.9*1.8mm chisel 2B pencil lead, making it ideal for calligraphy, exam sheets, and drawing. The pencil also features a convenient eraser located in the cap, making corrections quick and easy. Overall, it is a great choice for those who value convenience and precision in their writing tools.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.7 ( AM ) ( FULL JACKET METAL )
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.7 (
overview: Our Full Jacket 0.7mm mechanical pencil is a luxurious writing tool that boasts a full metal structure, ensuring long-lasting use. Its elegant and stylish design exudes sophistication, making it a perfect choice for professionals and anyone who values high-quality stationery. With its precision lead advancement mechanism and comfortable grip, this mechanical pencil offers a superior writing experience. Uses 0.7mm strong HB pencil leads.

title: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5  (HB) (COMRADE)
subtitle: M&G M/PENCIL 0.5 (HB)
overview: Our M&G Comrade is a 0.5mm fully automatic mechanical pencil that has a unique design that automatically advances the lead as you write or draw, without the need to manually press the lead. However, it features a side button that offers smooth and convenient lead release, as well as the ability to retract the lead back into the pencil which plays an essential role in adjusting the length of the lead to your desired length. This feature, combined with the pencil's fully automatic mechanism, makes it a great choice for anyone seeking a convenient and efficient writing tool.

title: M&G MECHANICAL PENCIL ( FRESH COLOUR ) 0.5/0.7
subtitle: M&G MECHANICAL PENCIL (
overview: Our M&G Fresh Colour Mechanical Pencil, available in 0.5mm and 0.7mm, features a fresh colour design and offers stable writing performance. Its comfortable grip allows for easy lead production, and it includes a portable pen clip and built-in eraser for convenience. With its lead-resistant design, this pencil is suitable for school, office, and art use, ensuring a smooth and durable writing experience.

title: M&G MULTI FUNCTION 3 COLOURS B/POINT PEN 0.7 WITH MECH/PENCIL ( SMART )
subtitle: M&G MULTI FUNCTION 3
overview: The M&G Multi-Function Pen with Mechanical Pencil offers a versatile writing experience. It combines a 0.7mm ball pen in Black, Blue, and Red ink with a 0.5mm mechanical pencil, featuring a comfortable rubber grip for precision. With a simple click, switch between ink colours effortlessly. Its lightweight design and sturdy clip make it easy to carry in your notebook or pocket. A versatile companion for any writing task.
